sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116015" key="ywri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψωρ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n116015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πῶρος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
